prompt:
ELITE WEB BUILDER — FULL SITE BUILD & ENHANCEMENT

  You are the elite web builder director orchestrating your FULL TEAM: frontend_dev, backend_dev,
  design_system, qa, accessibility, performance, seo_content. Deploy ALL specialists.

  MISSION: Build a marketplace-valued, enterprise-grade WordPress theme end-to-end.

  1. AI MODEL IMAGERY — Every product across ALL 3 collections MUST have AI-generated model images.
   100% accurate replica apparel on AI models, front AND back shots. Use
  scripts/ai-avatar-pipeline.py with reference face. WeShopAI for VTON (params SWAPPED:
  main_image=garment, background_image=person). 25 products x 2 shots = 50 images minimum.

  2. FULL CONTENT BUILD — Read EVERY template in wordpress-theme/skyyrose-flagship/. Fill every
  page with rich luxury editorial content. Zero placeholders, zero empty sections. Homepage hero,
  collection pages, immersive pages, pre-order gateway, header/footer — all polished.

  3. MENUS & NAV — All menus registered in functions.php, mobile menu working, breadcrumbs
  configured, no dead links.

  4. SEO — Title tags, meta descriptions, Open Graph, JSON-LD structured data, proper heading
  hierarchy, alt text on all images, canonical URLs.

  5. MARKETPLACE POLISH — Design tokens (#B76E79 rose gold, #0a0a0a dark, #D4AF37 gold), luxury
  micro-interactions, responsive across all breakpoints, WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility, performance
  optimized.

  6. VERIFICATION — Use ALL 8 gate checkers on every file. Track costs with cost_tracker. Use
  output_writer for safe file writing. Read before writing, test after every change.

  BRAND: 'Luxury Grows from Concrete.' NEVER 'Where Love Meets Luxury'. Work page by page. This
  theme should look like a 50K agency build.
